title: Portfolio: Writing Resume Bullets for Each Project
content:
### Day 235: Portfolio: Writing Resume Bullets for Each Project

**Resume Bullets — XYZ Formula:**
"Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y] by doing [Z]"

Example: "Built a customer churn prediction system achieving 91% AUC by engineering 15 features and deploying with FastAPI + Docker"
practiceQuestions: How to describe ML projects on resume?
keyTakeaways: Review the provided code sandbox to understand execution flow.
Attempt all practice questions without looking at the answers.
Reference the Crack the Interview library for deeper technical syntax.
